github.copilot.chat.commitMessageGenerat.text: <type>: build, ci, docs, feat, fix, perf, refactor, test. <scope> (optional): lab, rum, collect, sitemap, links, cli, prompts, profiles, utils. It is mandatory that both the value chosen in type and scope be one, and only one of those defined above.
<short summary> Summary must be in present tense, not capitalized, no period at the end. Max 100 characters for the full header.
